title: Four teams just broke AI agents four ways in ten days. The flaw is the same one.
summary: Security firm Manifold Security published research showing that any browser extension you install can quietly hijack Anthropic’s Claude for Chrome and make it read your Gmail, Google Docs and Calendar.
caption: output/2026-07-20/four-teams-just-broke-ai-agents-four-ways-in-ten-days-the-flaw-is-the-.txt
